overall.description: First-person walking perspective along a coastal highway in GTA V. The camera moves along the roadside shoulder transitioning to a dirt path, with various vehicles periodically passing by, revealing coastal shacks, power lines, and eventually opening up to a beach and pier view.

events.description: semi truck with 'Big G Goods' trailer passes from left to right
dark SUV passes from left to right kicking up dust

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved shoulder of the coastal highway

notable_agents.action: semi truck driving past on the highway
SUV driving past at high speed

entered.detail: calm blue ocean visible beyond the highway
two-lane asphalt road with cracked surface
wooden post fence running along the cliff edge
wooden power poles with multiple cross-arms

segments.scene_description: Walking along the paved shoulder of a coastal highway with the ocean visible to the left. A semi truck and then an SUV pass by on the road. Yellow curve warning signs and wooden utility poles line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder transitioning to dirt path

events.description: dark sedan passes from left to right on the highway
camera moves from paved asphalt onto dirt and grass shoulder beside the road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while stepping off the pavement onto the dirt shoulder

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the highway

entered.detail: weathered wooden shacks and elevated houses on the hillside
unpaved dirt and grass area beside the highway

segments.scene_description: Moving along the highway as a sedan passes by, then transitioning onto a dirt shoulder. Wooden coastal houses become visible on the right hillside while the ocean remains visible to the left.

events.description: black pickup truck passes from left to right
silver sedan passes from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking on the dirt path parallel to the highway as vehicles pass

entered.detail: large spiky desert vegetation and shrubs beside the path

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the dirt path with desert bushes and vegetation on the right. Two vehicles, a black pickup and a silver sedan, pass by on the adjacent highway. The coastal houses draw closer on the right.

events.description: white pickup truck passes from left to right
dune buggy comes into view parked on the dirt path ahead
beach and wooden pier become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path as the landscape opens up to reveal the beach

notable_agents.action: white pickup truck driving past on the highway

entered.detail: off-road dune buggy parked on the dirt beside the path
long wooden pier extending into the ocean
sandy beach area between the road and the water

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the coastal path as a white truck passes by. A dune buggy is parked ahead on the right, and the view opens up to reveal a sandy beach and long wooden pier extending into the ocean.

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge overlooking the beach and pier

entered.detail: rocky terrain and boulders on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a panoramic view of the sandy beach and wooden pier extending into the calm ocean. The camera walks along a dirt path on the cliffside, with rocky terrain on the right and the coastal highway now further inland. No vehicles pass during this peaceful overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a coastal highway that gradually transitions from a busy roadside shoulder into a serene cliffside overlook. It begins on the paved shoulder with the ocean to the left, passing yellow warning signs and utility poles as a semi truck and SUV drive by. As the camera moves forward and a sedan passes, the terrain shifts from pavement to a dirt shoulder, revealing wooden coastal houses nestled on the right hillside. The path then proceeds through desert vegetation while a black pickup and silver sedan pass on the adjacent road, eventually drawing closer to the hillside homes and a parked dune buggy. Finally, the view opens up as the camera moves along the rocky cliffside, leaving the highway behind to reveal a panoramic vista of a sandy beach and a long wooden pier extending into the calm ocean.
